parameters.query:
SELECT
  i.*,
  i.id                    AS issue_id,
  i.title                 AS issue_title,

  CONVERT_TZ(i.end_date, '+00:00', '+05:30') AS issue_end_date_ist,

  DATEDIFF(
    DATE(CONVERT_TZ(UTC_TIMESTAMP(), '+00:00', '+05:30')),
    DATE(CONVERT_TZ(i.end_date, '+00:00', '+05:30'))
  ) AS overdue_days,

  pm.id                   AS project_id,
  pm.title                AS project_title,

  m.id                    AS milestone_id,
  m.title                 AS milestone_title,

  t.id                    AS task_id,
  t.title                 AS task_title,

  rp.id                   AS responsible_person_id,
  rp.firstname            AS responsible_person_firstname,
  rp.lastname             AS responsible_person_lastname,
  rp.email                AS responsible_person_email,

  pmo.email               AS project_manager_email,
  pmo.firstname           AS project_manager_firstname,
  pmo.lastname            AS project_manager_lastname

FROM issues i

JOIN spree_users rp
  ON rp.id = i.responsible_person_id

JOIN project_managements pm
  ON pm.id = i.project_management_id

JOIN spree_users pmo
  ON pmo.id = pm.owner_id

LEFT JOIN milestones m
  ON m.id = i.milestone_id

LEFT JOIN task_managements t
  ON t.id = i.task_management_id

WHERE
  DATE(CONVERT_TZ(i.end_date, '+00:00', '+05:30'))
    < DATE(CONVERT_TZ(UTC_TIMESTAMP(), '+00:00', '+05:30'))
  AND i.status NOT IN ('completed', 'closed')
  AND rp.organization_id IN (13, 14, 59, 84);

parameters.subject: =Issue Overdue Alert: {{$json.issue_title}}
parameters.html:
=

Dear {{$json.project_manager_firstname}} {{$json.project_manager_lastname}},

The issue {{$json.issue_title}} has exceeded its planned resolution timeline and is currently overdue.

Overdue Issue Details

Issue Title {{$json.issue_title}}
Description {{$json.description}}
Severity / Priority {{$json.priority}}
Current Status {{$json.status}}
Issue Created On {{$json.created_at}}
Issue End On {{$json.issue_end_date_ist}}
Project Title {{$json.project_title}}
Milestone {{$json.milestone_title || 'N/A'}}
Linked Task {{$json.task_title || 'N/A'}})
Assigned Owner {{$json.responsible_person_firstname}} {{$json.responsible_person_lastname}}
Overdue By {{$json.overdue_days}} days
Issue Link View Issue Details

Please provide an immediate update with revised resolution timelines or closure remarks to prevent further escalation.

Regards,
PMO – Issue Escalation Desk

parameters.subject: =Issue Overdue Alert: {{ $json.total_overdue_issues }} Issues have been overdue under the projects that you are managing.
parameters.html:
=

Dear {{$json.project_manager_firstname}} {{$json.project_manager_lastname}},

The following issues under your project(s) have exceeded their planned resolution timelines and are currently overdue.

Total Overdue Issues: {{$json.total_overdue_issues}}

{{ $json.issues.map(issue => ` `).join('') }}
Issue Description Priority Status Created On Due Date (IST) Overdue Days Project Milestone Task Owner Link
${issue.issue_title} ${issue.description || 'N/A'} ${issue.priority || 'N/A'} ${issue.status} ${issue.created_at} ${issue.issue_end_date_ist} ${issue.overdue_days} days ${issue.project_title || 'N/A'} ${issue.milestone_title || 'N/A'} ${issue.task_title || 'N/A'} ${issue.responsible_person_name} View

Please ensure timely resolution or provide updated timelines to avoid further escalation.

Regards,
PMO – Issue Escalation Desk

parameters.subject: =Issues Overdue: {{ $json.total_overdue_issues }} Issues have been overdue that was assigned to you.
parameters.html:
=

Dear {{$json.responsible_person_firstname}} {{$json.responsible_person_lastname}},

The following issues assigned to you have exceeded their planned resolution timelines and are currently overdue.

Total Overdue Issues: {{$json.total_overdue_issues}}

{{ $json.issues.map(issue => ` `).join('') }}
Issue Description Priority Status Created On Due Date (IST) Overdue Days Project Milestone Task Project Manager Link
${issue.issue_title} ${issue.description || 'N/A'} ${issue.priority || 'N/A'} ${issue.status} ${issue.created_at} ${issue.issue_end_date_ist} ${issue.overdue_days} days ${issue.project_title || 'N/A'} ${issue.milestone_title || 'N/A'} ${issue.task_title || 'N/A'} ${issue.project_manager_name} View

Please take immediate action to resolve these issues or update the status with revised timelines.

Regards,
PMO – Issue Escalation Desk
